title.en: [Highlight] Seiya Suzuki crushes a grand slam to give the Cubs the lead
title.ja: 鈴木誠也、満塁ホームランでカブス勝ち越し

summaryJa: クアーズフィールドでの対ロッキーズ戦、鈴木誠也が満塁アーチを叩き込んでカブスが勝ち越し。打線が湿りがちなカブスだけに、現地ニキたちは喜ぶより先に「これ許されるの!?」「『勝ち越し』って何だっけ?」と自虐モードで騒然。さらに「このチーム、勢いだけでポストシーズン行くわ」というカブスらしい愛のある毒づき、ロッキーズ実況が『フェルトナー22打者連続アウト』と口にした直後の一発というジンクスネタ、そしてお決まりの『クアーズにカブスファン多すぎ問題』まで。鈴木の一発を肴にした海外カブスニキの実況をまとめた。

media.caption: 鈴木誠也、満塁ホームランでカブスが勝ち越し（対ロッキーズ・クアーズフィールド）

comments.author: CutePuppyforPrez
comments.bodyEn: Lead? What a strange word...
comments.bodyJa: 勝ち越し? なんだその聞き慣れない単語は…

comments.author: Top-Middle6326
comments.bodyEn: Oh my god… I didn't know this was allowed
comments.bodyJa: うせやろ…こんなの許されるんか

comments.author: LoudHuckleberry2839
comments.bodyEn: Right? I think I blacked out for a second there. Suzuki's been on fire lately.
comments.bodyJa: な? 一瞬意識飛んだわ。誠也ここんとこ絶好調だし。

comments.author: organizedchaos5220
comments.bodyEn: He has not
comments.bodyJa: 絶好調じゃないが

comments.author: laughing_andcrying
comments.bodyEn: Is this allowed?!
comments.bodyJa: これアリなん!?

comments.author: Ok_Weakness8334
comments.bodyEn: what timeline am I in
comments.bodyJa: 俺いまどの時間軸にいるんだ

comments.author: Fantastic-Strike144
comments.bodyEn: right? feels like we somehow jumped into an alternate reality where the Cubs actually have reliable offense
comments.bodyJa: な? カブスがまともに点取れる別世界に迷い込んだ気分だわ

comments.author: blueskyren
comments.bodyEn: Cathartic as hell man, Cubs finally coming through in a prime scoring opportunity
comments.bodyJa: マジで胸がスッとする…カブスがようやくチャンスでちゃんと仕事したぞ

comments.author: Patrick2701
comments.bodyEn: This team is going bullshit their way into the postseason.
comments.bodyJa: このチーム、勢いとノリだけでポストシーズン行く気だな

comments.author: TCup20
comments.bodyEn: They're gonna bullshit their way into Jed getting extended forever.
comments.bodyJa: そのノリでGM(ジェド)の契約まで永久に延長されるパターンや

comments.author: Calm-Pace-6020
comments.bodyEn: For real, feels like we've been leaving dudes stranded on base all month. Hope this breaks the slump.
comments.bodyJa: ほんとそれ。今月ずっと走者残塁しまくってた感あるし。これでスランプ抜けてくれ

comments.author: atowelguy
comments.bodyEn: I blame our broadcast for mentioning Feltner's 22-batter streak of getting hitters out at the start of the inning
comments.bodyJa: 悪いのはウチ(ロッキーズ)の実況や。イニング頭でフェルトナーの『22打者連続アウト』とか言い出すから

comments.author: Head-Entrepreneur669
comments.bodyEn: Classic jinx right there. You just know the second they bring up a streak like that, it's getting snapped before the inning ends.
comments.bodyJa: ザ・フラグ。ああいう連続記録を口に出した瞬間、そのイニング終わる前に途切れるのは確定なんよ

comments.author: Patrick2701
comments.bodyEn: Holy shit, I was watching the World Cup and saw this. My god
comments.bodyJa: うおおW杯見てたらこれ流れてきた。なんてこった

comments.author: cmgriffith_
comments.bodyEn: Cubs hit a grand slam. All is right on the North Side
comments.bodyJa: カブスが満塁弾。ノースサイドは今日も平和だ

comments.author: Old_General_6741
comments.bodyEn: What a slam!! Massive hit! That is a lot of Cubs Fans.
comments.bodyJa: なんつー満塁弾!! デカい一発! …てかカブスファン多すぎだろ

comments.author: Agentkeenan78
comments.bodyEn: That's a lot of cubs fans in Colorado
comments.bodyJa: コロラドにカブスファン多すぎでは

comments.author: mt77932
comments.bodyEn: Cubs have always traveled well. I've been to a game in Cincinnati where the stadium was 75% Cub fans.
comments.bodyJa: カブスは昔から遠征人気がすごいんよ。シンシナティの試合行ったら球場の75%カブスファンだったことあるわ

comments.author: gonz4dieg
comments.bodyEn: I low key love how the rockies crowd 90% of the time kind of does not give a shit about who is winning, theyre just there for good vibes lmao.
comments.bodyJa: ロッキーズの客、9割方どっちが勝ってるとか割とどうでもよくて、ただ良い雰囲気を楽しみに来てる感じなの地味に好きw

comments.author: neverAcquiesce
comments.bodyEn: I think it's more so that Cubs fans are nationwide, especially in markets where WGN predates the local team.
comments.bodyJa: ていうかカブスファンは全国にいるんよ。特に地元球団より先にWGN(カブス中継局)が入ってた地域はな

comments.author: devoorhes
comments.bodyEn: Or in places where there are lots of midwest transplants. Arizona and Seattle get large Cubs fan contingents when they're in town, too.
comments.bodyJa: あと中西部からの移住者が多い土地な。アリゾナやシアトルも遠征行くとカブスファンの大群が湧く

comments.author: AnimalCrackBox
comments.bodyEn: Coors is a beautiful place. I'd hang out there a couple times a week if I could and I wouldn't care who was on the field either.
comments.bodyJa: クアーズは良い球場だからな。週2で通えるもんなら通うし、誰がグラウンドにいようと気にせず楽しむわ

comments.author: Joeygus
comments.bodyEn: I'm at the game and it's about 40/40 Rockies Cubs fans and the others are on the rooftop drinking. Honestly there have been more Rockies fans than I expected
comments.bodyJa: 現地で見てるけど、ロッキーズ40:カブス40、残りはルーフトップで飲んでる勢って感じ。正直思ってたよりロッキーズファンいるぞ

comments.author: barstoolsam
comments.bodyEn: Where are the Rockies fans man
comments.bodyJa: で、そのロッキーズファンはどこにいるんですかね
